items.headline: Palantir Technologies stock is up on strong Q1 beat, raised guidance, and bullish defense/AI headlines
Freedom Broker lifts Palantir (PLTR) price target to $230 from $170 and reiterates Buy after strong Q1 results
Palantir-backed Ondas reports explosive revenue growth and raises full-year guidance, boosting sentiment around PLTR’s defense/drone ecosystem
Palantir Technologies receives consensus recommendation of 'Moderate Buy' from brokerages
Retail traders are trimming holdings of longtime AI favorite Palantir in pivot away from software stocks
Palantir's access to identifiable NHS England patient data called 'dangerous' by UK MPs
